# Tech Debt Template

## Debt Summary
- Short description of the technical debt item.

## Root Cause
- Why this debt exists.

## Current Cost / Risk
- Maintenance cost, reliability risk, performance impact, or delivery friction.

## Target State
- Desired architecture or code quality outcome.

## Scope
- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Plan / Migration
- Incremental steps to reach target state.
- Rollback or fallback strategy (if needed).

## Verification
- Measurable checks, commands, and expected outcomes.

## Constraints / Risks
- Known constraints, dependencies, and risks.

## Notes
- Additional context or references.
